job_spec.original_text:
Role: Senior AI Engineer - Agentic Talent Scouting

We are building an AI-powered talent scouting and engagement agent for recruiters. The agent should parse job descriptions, discover matching candidates, score them with explainable match logic, simulate conversational outreach, and return a ranked shortlist that a recruiter can act on immediately.

Responsibilities:
- Build production-quality Python services and clean recruiter-facing workflows.
- Design AI agents with tool calling, RAG, candidate matching, ranking, and evaluation loops.
- Create transparent scoring for Match Score and Interest Score.
- Work with candidate data responsibly, including privacy and human-in-the-loop review.

Requirements:
- 3+ years of experience building AI or ML products.
- Strong Python and FastAPI.
- Experience with LLMs, RAG, embeddings, vector databases, and prompt engineering.
- Bonus: recruiting, talent sourcing, ATS integrations, LangGraph, observability, and privacy.

Location: Remote or Bengaluru hybrid.
job_spec.title: AI Engineer
responsibilities: Build production-quality Python services and clean recruiter-facing workflows.
Design AI agents with tool calling, RAG, candidate matching, ranking, and evaluation loops.
recruiter_questions: Can the candidate show a working ai engineer project with real users or realistic data?
What evidence proves the candidate can ship an end-to-end prototype quickly?
Can they explain trade-offs around human-in-the-loop, tool calling, evaluations?
Do they understand domain-specific risks in hrtech?
Are they comfortable with the role's remote operating model?

sources: technical blogs, demo videos, and talks (simulated)
filters: evidence required: project, achievement, or public artifact

candidate.name: Aanya Rao
candidate.headline: Agentic AI engineer building production recruiting copilots
projects: Built a hiring-copilot that parsed JDs, searched an internal talent graph, and generated recruiter-ready shortlists.
Shipped a LangGraph agent with tool calling, retries, and evaluation traces for enterprise users.
achievements: Reduced recruiter screening time by 38% in a pilot with 12 hiring managers.
Created an LLM eval harness covering hallucination, source attribution, and extraction quality.
evidence: Public repo shows FastAPI + LangGraph agent orchestration with typed state transitions.
Blog post explains candidate matching with embeddings, hard constraints, and audit trails.
Demo video includes conversational outreach simulation and recruiter handoff workflow.
reservations: will ask about data access and production roadmap
candidate.public_source: Simulated GitHub, portfolio, and LinkedIn-style profile

ranked_shortlist.match_explanation: Aanya Rao scores 88.1/100 because of direct coverage in ai agents, embeddings, evaluations, fastapi, langgraph; adjacent depth for human-in-the-loop, ranking, prompt engineering; domain overlap in hrtech. Main gaps: scoring models, privacy.
ranked_shortlist.outreach_hook: Lead with their ai agents, embeddings, evaluations work: Public repo shows FastAPI + LangGraph agent orchestration with typed state transitions.

transcript.message: Hi Aanya, I noticed your work on built a hiring-copilot that parsed jds, searched an internal talent graph, and generated recruiter-ready shortlists. We are hiring for AI Engineer and the role needs human-in-the-loop, tool calling, evaluations. Would you be open to a quick exploratory chat?

transcript.speaker: candidate
transcript.message: Yes, this is relevant. I am especially interested in agentic ai, and the AI Engineer scope sounds close to work I have already shipped.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.message: Helpful. Before I shortlist you, I want to confirm three things: hands-on production evidence, availability, and what would make the role worth your time.

transcript.speaker: candidate
transcript.message: My notice period is 30 days and compensation expectation is around 42 LPA. The strongest pull is motivated by agentic ai. Main concern: will ask about data access and production roadmap.

reservations: will ask about data access and production roadmap
next_steps: Send recruiter screen invite within 24 hours.
Ask for proof around human-in-the-loop in a shipped project.

audit_log: Received job description and initialized scouting run.
Parsed JD into title=AI Engineer, seniority=senior, skills=10 must-have/9 nice-to-have.
Discovered 12 candidate profiles from simulated public and ATS sources.
Computed match, interest, and combined ranking scores with explainable breakdowns.
Returned top 5 candidates with next actions for the recruiter.
